runtime_assertions.name: Module still installs cleanly after changes
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush cr && ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled 2>&1 | grep -q group_ai_pm && echo PASS || echo FAIL
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — any PHP syntax error or broken service definition prevents module from loading

runtime_assertions.name: At least one API route is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $found = FALSE; foreach (['/api/group-ai-pm', '/api/kanban', '/api/project', '/api/task'] as $pattern) { $routes = $provider->getRoutesByPattern($pattern); if (count(iterator_to_array($routes)) > 0) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Verifies at least one API route was registered in the router (flexible path matching)

runtime_assertions.name: Board route is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $found = FALSE; foreach (['group_ai_pm.project.board', 'group_ai_pm.board', 'group_ai_pm.kanban', 'group_ai_pm.project.kanban'] as $name) { try { $provider->getRouteByName($name); $found = TRUE; break; } catch (\Exception $e) {} } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Verifies the board page route exists (checks multiple naming conventions)

runtime_assertions.name: Board route has _admin_route option
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); foreach (['group_ai_pm.project.board', 'group_ai_pm.board', 'group_ai_pm.kanban', 'group_ai_pm.project.kanban'] as $name) { try { $route = $provider->getRouteByName($name); if ($route->getOption('_admin_route')) { echo 'PASS'; exit; } } catch (\Exception $e) {} } echo 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Board route must use admin theme for consistent admin UI

runtime_assertions.name: Kanban theme hook is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$hooks = \Drupal::service('theme.registry')->get(); $found = FALSE; foreach (array_keys($hooks) as $hook) { if (strpos($hook, 'kanban') !== FALSE && strpos($hook, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Verifies hook_theme() registered a kanban theme hook (flexible name matching)

runtime_assertions.name: API mutation route has CSRF header requirement
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && strpos($name, 'api') !== FALSE) { $reqs = $route->getRequirements(); if (isset($reqs['_csrf_request_header_token'])) { $found = TRUE; break; } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Mutation API routes must use _csrf_request_header_token (header-based) not _csrf_token (query-based)

runtime_assertions.name: API routes have _format:json requirement
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$provider = \Drupal::service('router.route_provider'); $all = $provider->getAllRoutes(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($all as $name => $route) { if (strpos($name, 'group_ai_pm') !== FALSE && strpos($name, 'api') !== FALSE) { $reqs = $route->getRequirements(); if (isset($reqs['_format']) && $reqs['_format'] === 'json') { $found = TRUE; break; } } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: API routes need _format:json for JSON error responses instead of HTML

runtime_assertions.name: TaskApiController class exists and is loadable
runtime_assertions.rationale: Controller must be autoloadable (correct namespace, file location)

runtime_assertions.name: KanbanController class exists and is loadable
runtime_assertions.rationale: Board page controller must be autoloadable

runtime_assertions.name: Kanban library is defined
runtime_assertions.rationale: Kanban library must be registered in libraries.yml for the Vue app to load

runtime_assertions.name: Kanban library has drupalSettings dependency
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$lib = \Drupal::service('library.discovery')->getLibraryByName('group_ai_pm', 'kanban'); $deps = $lib['dependencies'] ?? []; $found = FALSE; foreach ($deps as $dep) { if (strpos($dep, 'drupalSettings') !== FALSE) { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Without core/drupalSettings dependency, JS settings may load after kanban code

runtime_assertions.name: Board local task tab is registered
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$manager = \Drupal::service('plugin.manager.menu.local_task'); $defs = $manager->getDefinitions(); $found = FALSE; foreach ($defs as $id => $def) { if ((strpos($id, 'board') !== FALSE || strpos($id, 'kanban') !== FALSE) && isset($def['base_route']) && $def['base_route'] === 'entity.project.canonical') { $found = TRUE; break; } } echo $found ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Board tab must appear on project entity page via local task link (checks both 'board' and 'kanban' naming)

runtime_assertions.name: Project entity can be created programmatically
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — entity creation still works after module changes

runtime_assertions.name: Task entity can be created with project reference
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$projects = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->loadMultiple(); $pid = array_key_first($projects); $task = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('task')->create(['title' => 'Test Task', 'status' => 'todo', 'priority' => 'medium', 'project' => $pid]); $task->save(); echo $task->id() ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Baseline sanity — task creation with project reference still works

runtime_assertions.name: KanbanController board() executes without exception
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$project = \Drupal::entityTypeManager()->getStorage('project')->create(['title' => 'Board Render Test', 'status' => 'active']); $project->save(); $controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\KanbanController'); try { $result = $controller->board($project); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Actually executes the board controller to catch runtime errors like calling methods on wrong objects (e.g., getAccessControlHandler() on storage instead of entityTypeManager) — metadata-only assertions miss these

runtime_assertions.name: DashboardController content() executes without exception (empty state)
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$controller = \Drupal::classResolver()->getInstanceFromDefinition('\\Drupal\\group_ai_pm\\Controller\\DashboardController'); try { $result = $controller->content(); echo is_array($result) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL'; } catch (\Exception $e) { echo 'FAIL: ' . $e->getMessage(); }"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Executes dashboard controller empty state path — catches non-existent route references in Url::fromRoute() that only crash at render time, not at route registration

runtime_assertions.name: Vue library does not use defer attribute
runtime_assertions.command: ddev drush php-eval "$lib = \Drupal::service('library.discovery')->getLibraryByName('group_ai_pm', 'vue'); foreach ($lib['js'] as $file) { if (isset($file['attributes']['defer'])) { echo 'FAIL: defer on Vue global breaks IIFE consumers'; exit; } } echo 'PASS';"
runtime_assertions.rationale: Vue is externalized as a global consumed by IIFE-bundled kanban.js — defer causes Vue to execute after the consumer, producing 'Vue is not defined' errors at runtime
